creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 207721
svn diff to upgrade to 0.58.3

gohugo has been updated to 0.58.3
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.58.3)

The attached svn diff brings this port up to 0.58.3

Change log:
- Add some more resource transform tests
- Fix cache key transformed resources
- deploy: Do not compile in Azure on Solaris

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)
- testport: OK (poudriere: <11.3-RELEASE, 11.3-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.0-STABLE, 12.1-PRERELEASE, and 13.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
